instruction_summary: Continue handling open issues that do not require additional requirement decisions, using .tmp.requirements-checklist.md as the hold list for issues that need design clarification.
actual_work: Used .tmp.requirements-checklist.md as the hold list, confirmed GitHub CLI was unavailable in this environment, inferred concrete next slices from recent merged PRs, completed the remaining issue #152 wiring for UTF-8 download filenames by applying existing Content-Disposition helpers to direct document-file downloads and ZIP download responses, advanced issue #118 by adding an admin project-template preview/apply workflow on the project edit screen, advanced issue #127 by adding project-scoped document catalog index/show routes with viewer-aware item filtering, advanced issue #119 by adding an admin document usage report screen backed by the existing usage-report services, and advanced issue #117 by adding user/admin access-request screens plus approval/cancellation flows around visible document/file download requests. Added request coverage for UTF-8 filename headers on version archives and project ZIP downloads, added admin request coverage for template preview/apply behavior, added request coverage for catalog visibility boundaries, added admin request coverage for usage report visibility and rendering, added request coverage for access-request creation/list/cancel/approve/reject flows, and updated repo docs to state the new contracts.
changed_files: docs/アプリケーション仕様.md
docs/ファイル配信・storage運用方針.md
